journal_entry.description: Deposit received for future moving services
journal_entry.rationale: Cash increases (asset) from bank transfer. Since the moving services will be performed in one month, revenue cannot be recognized yet under IFRS 15. The deposit creates a liability (unearned revenue/customer deposit) until the performance obligation is satisfied.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Deposit received for services to be performed in the future. Cash increases (asset), unearned revenue increases (liability). No revenue recognized until services are performed per IFRS 15 revenue recognition principles.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Deposit received for services to be performed in the future. Cash increases (asset), unearned revenue increases (liability). No revenue recognized until services are performed per IFRS 15 revenue recognition principles.
